content:
The app supports a two column view. Navigate to general settings > display > show split-screen.

The best place to promote your idea for a 3 column view is on Mozilla connect where the community can vote on it.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/idb-p/ideas/label-name/thunderbird%20android
creator: platform34

content:
What errors are you seeing in Thunderbird for Android that leads you to believe it's being blocked. Are you a business hosting your own mail server?

CBL blacklists help mail companies decide whether to accept or reject "Incoming" mail to their server. It doesn't typically block users from recieving email in their mail client.

Are you using any kind of mobile antivirus such as Avast mobile security. Another user with a similar issue found disabling it's web guard feature resolved the issue.

Have you tried rebooting your router? ISPs often issue home users their public IP by DHCP. The reboot should assign you a different IP address.
creator: platform34

content: I had forgotten to reboot the router. Thank you. Keld
creator: kpia

content:
Is this a new account you've added to TB-A or errors that just started occuring on a previously working configuration?

The lack of a password field would be normal for oAuth 2.0 authentication. Plain user name and password authentication is no longer supported by Yahoo.

Try logging into your webmail, send yourself an email to confirm the account is functioning normally. It might be a temporary service issue or a full mailbox.
creator: platform34

content: I'm not sure whether I ever tried sending email from the Android phone before. But after some difficulties with TB 148 (now resolved) I thought I should test it. On further investigation, I found a spelling mistake in my username in the SMTP settings. All is OK now.
